endpoints.name: HEAD /providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccountNames/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Checks that the Azure Cosmos DB account name already exists. A valid account name may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and the '-' character, and must be between 3 and 50 characters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Cosmos DB Resource Provider operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
endpoints.description: Lists all the Azure Cosmos DB database accounts available under the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{accountName}/failoverPriorityChange
endpoints.description: Changes the failover priority for the Azure Cosmos DB database account. A failover priority of 0 indicates a write region. The maximum value for a failover priority = (total number of regions - 1). Failover priority values must be unique for each of the regions in which the database account exists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
